description: Network sync policy schema for product modules. This is metadata only until runtime networking is implemented.

fields.sync: local keeps behavior single-player/local-only; lockstep synchronizes deterministic inputs; state synchronizes authoritative state; event synchronizes discrete events.
fields.authority: client, host, or server authority for the module state.
fields.tickRate: Simulation or network tick rate reserved for future sync runtimes.
fields.seed: Deterministic seed value. Use auto for compiler-assigned stable defaults.
